rationale: Review 2 correctly identifies that the `instFiberContinuousConstSMul` docstring embeds proof justification ('since each deck transformation acts by a homeomorphism of the fibre') rather than describing only the result — a real, documented Lean/Mathlib convention violation confirmed in the diff at lines 107-108. Acting on Review 2's fix yields a cleaner docstring; Review 1 misses this entirely.
